data.content: 1. The core knot data model is still missing a first-class acceptance field: knot_hot migrations, KnotCacheRecord, UpsertKnotHot, KnotView, and rehydration only carry body/description and do not define or round-trip acceptance. 2. The CLI/write path is still missing acceptance support: UpdateArgs and queued write operations expose description fields but no --acceptance flag or acceptance patch field. 3. The event/sync path is still missing acceptance support: FullEventKind has knot.description_set but no knot.acceptance_set, and app/sync rehydration only apply description updates. 4. The parent spec also requires the foolery knots-backend migration, but this repository contains no non-node_modules TypeScript files and no toBeat/addNote/foolery backend implementation to review for that requirement. 5. Validation passed: make sanity succeeded on 2026-03-22 with 95.18% coverage, so the rejection is on spec drift and missing scope rather than broken gates.
